changeSet.author: claude

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) >= 1 FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'DNA Extraction Kit'

changeSet.comment: Update existing demo inventory items with realistic project name associations

column.name: project_name
column.value: Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory

update.where: name IN ( 'DNA Extraction Kit', 'RNA Preservation Buffer', 'PCR Master Mix', 'Malaria RDT Buffer', 'Ethanol (Molecular Biology Grade)', 'Nuclease-Free Water' )
name IN ( 'Cell Lysis Buffer', 'Proteinase K Solution' )
item_type = 'INSTRUMENT' AND name IN ( 'Microcentrifuge (Eppendorf 5424R)', 'Vortex Mixer (Scientific Industries SI-0236)', 'Biosafety Cabinet Class II (Thermo Fisher 1300-Series)' )

column.name: project_name
column.value: Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory

update.where: item_type = 'INSTRUMENT' AND name IN ( 'PCR Thermocycler (Bio-Rad T100)', 'Micropipette Set (Gilson PIPETMAN-SET)', 'NanoDrop Spectrophotometer (Thermo Fisher ND-2000)' )

changeSet.author: claude

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE name = 'HIV ELISA Test Kit'

changeSet.comment: Create additional inventory items with project associations to demonstrate comprehensive coverage

column.name: description
column.value: Rapid diagnostic test for Plasmodium falciparum and vivax

column.name: project_name
column.value: Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory

column.name: description
column.value: Rapid test for dengue virus NS1 antigen detection

column.name: project_name
column.value: Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory

column.name: description
column.value: Enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay for HIV antibody detection

column.name: description
column.value: Flow cytometry kit for CD4+ T-lymphocyte enumeration

changeSet.author: claude

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) >= 1 FROM clinlims.inventory_item WHERE project_name = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Create inventory lots for the new items to demonstrate project-based inventory tracking

changeSet.author: claude

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'Immunology Laboratory Room'

changeSet.comment: Create comprehensive storage location hierarchy for Ethiopian lab setup

column.name: description
column.value: Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease laboratory

column.name: parent_location_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'Immunology Laboratory Room' AND location_type = 'ROOM')

column.name: parent_location_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'Immunology Laboratory Room' AND location_type = 'ROOM')

column.name: description
column.value: Primary reagent storage for MNTD workflows

column.name: parent_location_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'MNTD Laboratory Room' AND location_type = 'ROOM')

column.name: parent_location_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'MNTD Laboratory Room' AND location_type = 'ROOM')

column.name: description
column.value: General storage cabinet for room temperature items

column.name: parent_location_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'General Storage Room' AND location_type = 'ROOM')

column.name: parent_location_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'Immunology Refrigerator A')

column.name: parent_location_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'MNTD Reagent Refrigerator')

column.name: parent_location_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'Room Temperature Cabinet')

changeSet.author: claude

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) >= 1 FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'Immunology Refrigerator A'

changeSet.comment: Add realistic opening dates and storage locations to existing demo lots

changeSet.author: claude

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) >= 1 FROM clinlims.inventory_lot WHERE lot_number = 'IMMUNO-CD4-2025-004'
SELECT COUNT(*) >= 1 FROM clinlims.inventory_storage_location WHERE name = 'Immunology Ref A - Shelf 1'

changeSet.comment: Update the newly created lots with appropriate storage locations

changeSet.author: claude
